title: Lebanese Troops Deploy in Israeli-Held Village Under New Cease-Fire Plan
summary_full: The Israeli military withdrew from the village under a U.S.-brokered deal to transfer control of occupied areas back to Lebanon after months of war. But Hezbollah has rejected the truce.
summary_public: The Israeli military withdrew from the village under a U.S.-brokered deal to transfer control of occupied areas back to Lebanon after months of war. But Hezbollah has rejected the truce.

IL.label: positive
IL.evidence: Israeli military withdrew from the village under a U.S.-brokered deal
